moneyLine: 93% FCR. $1M saved. 150 agents. Real AI implementation.

caseStudies.title: Unified Operational Intelligence
caseStudies.summary: Real-time Genesys + UKG + Helpdesk consolidation with predictive SLA alerts
caseStudies.description: Real-time consolidation of Genesys Cloud, UKG workforce management, and Helpdesk data into a unified dashboard with predictive SLA alerts and AI-powered recommendations.

caseStudies.title: Email Command Center
caseStudies.summary: n8n-powered email triage with Slack alerts and AI-drafted responses
caseStudies.description: n8n-powered email triage system with Slack alerts, AI-drafted responses, and automated routing. Reduces response time to under 2 minutes with 95% accuracy.

caseStudies.title: MindMeld Reasoning Program
caseStudies.summary: Multi-model orchestration for complex decision-making workflows
caseStudies.description: Multi-model orchestration framework that routes complex queries to the optimal AI model. Combines Claude, GPT-4, and custom models for enhanced decision-making.

publications.title: Crushin' Claude
publications.author: Pete Connor
publications.description: A field manual for using Claude in production — covering Claude Code, the API, MCP, Skills, Agents & Workflows. 9 chapters compressed from 193,500 words of Anthropic course curriculum.
